# Mona Mayhem Copilot Instructions

This project uses a retro-neon cyberpunk arcade design style.

## Visual style
- Use a dark background with bright neon accents
- Primary accent colors: #FF00FF, #00F5FF, #8B5CF6
- Buttons should feel bold, glowing, and game-like
- Use card layouts, soft glows, strong contrast, and rounded corners
- Any important UI should look like a battle arena dashboard

## Layout rules
- Use responsive layouts with CSS grid or flexbox
- Keep spacing clean and readable
- Make the interface feel polished and arcade-inspired
- Prioritize a clear hierarchy for headings, buttons, panels, and stats

## Tone and wording
- Use short, energetic, battle-themed text
- Prefer wording like: arena, battle, match, power-up, victory, score, game over
- Keep text concise and readable

## UI behavior
- Add visible hover and focus states
- Keep controls accessible and beginner-friendly
- Make all screens readable on smaller screens

## Code style
- Keep code beginner-friendly
- Add comments for major sections
- Use clear naming
- Prefer simple, maintainable structures over advanced abstractions

## New components and screens
Any new screens or UI components should follow this retro-neon cyberpunk arcade identity.
